title: Hemipilia exilis
taxonomy: Hemipilia exilis is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This family is one of the largest and most diverse groups of flowering plants, with over 30,000 known species. The genus Hemipilia is a small genus within the subtribe Orchidinae, which is a subgroup of the tribe Orchideae. The subtribe Orchidinae is characterized by its unique floral features and is predominantly found in tropical and subtropical regions. intro: Hemipilia exilis is a plant species native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia, classified as a type of orchid belonging to the family Orchidaceae.
